prompt: Pick up the box and place it in the red bowl
zero_shot_disclosure: Model was finetuned on whosricky/so101-megamix-v1 only. This dataset (so101_box_to_bowl_v2) was NOT in the training set. Single-chunk eval: each sample feeds a REAL frame from the unseen dataset and measures how well the model's 0.8-second action prediction matches the human teleoperator's recorded actions.
